purpose: Local deterministic budgets for package size and startup/import smoke. Ceilings are intentionally explicit so regressions are visible before publish or handoff.

calibrationPolicy.tighteningRule: After calibrationPolicy.requiredSuccessfulRuns successful runs on a clean built tree, set each ceiling to the greater of actual * 1.35 or actual + the smallest practical fixed buffer.

fileSize.rationale: SDK root import should remain a small wrapper over generated code, not a bundled application. Recalibrated from 3500 after the money/invoice-body/resolve/dates root re-exports grew the barrel to ~4008 bytes (actual + ~12% headroom).

CJS root import should stay close to ESM size after dual-build emit. Recalibrated from 18500 after the list/filter resolver root re-exports (resolveUserRefs/resolveGroupRefs/resolveTagRefs/resolveUserFilter) plus the add-on-token error exports (AddonTokenRestrictionError/mapAddonTokenRestriction) grew the CJS barrel to ~18888 bytes (actual + ~8.5% headroom).
CLI startup entrypoint should remain lightweight and command-dispatch oriented. Calibrated from measured baseline of 5776 bytes.
MCP stdio entrypoint should not absorb generated SDK internals or fixture data. Calibrated from measured baseline of 1110 bytes.

timing.name: sdk-esm-import
timing.rationale: A consumer should be able to import the SDK root without expensive runtime setup. Calibrated from measured baseline ~240ms.

timing.name: cli-version
timing.rationale: The CLI should print version/help quickly before any Clockify network setup. Calibrated from measured baseline ~185ms.

timing.name: mcp-tools-list
timing.rationale: MCP clients should be able to discover the 126-tool surface quickly on local stdio startup. Calibrated from measured baseline ~440ms.
